name: twilio-sms
description: Send an SMS message via Twilio. Supports AU phone number normalisation and message templating.

inputs.name: to
inputs.description: Recipient phone number (E.164 format or AU mobile like 04XX XXX XXX)

inputs.name: from
inputs.description: Override the sender number (defaults to TWILIO_FROM_NUMBER env var)

credentials.label: Twilio From Number
credentials.description: Your Twilio phone number in E.164 format
